title: New patient wanting to register
goal: You're brand new to the practice and want to register and book a first appointment.
hypothesis: Does the agent collect new-patient info sensibly and accurately, or mishear/auto-fill details (e.g. invent a DOB) and confirm wrong data back?
opening_line: Hi, I'm new to your clinic — I'd like to register as a patient and set up a first visit.
edge_behavior: When it collects your details, listen for whether it reads back exactly what you said or fills in/guesses anything (especially date of birth) you never gave.
wrap_up_when: you're registered (or told the next step) and a first appointment is discussed
